content.json:
## Linux Arc Benefits
Track which Arc capabilities are configured across your Linux servers. Each tab shows configured vs. unconfigured servers for a specific capability.

### Benefits Overview
Summary of all Linux Arc capabilities across your estate.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | extend extType = tostring(properties.type)
    | summarize extensions = make_set(extType) by parentId
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend hasAMA = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and extensions has 'AzureMonitorLinuxAgent', 1, 0)
| extend hasDefender = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and (extensions has 'MDE.Linux' or extensions has 'AzureSecurityLinuxAgent'), 1, 0)
| extend hasGuestConfig = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and (extensions has 'ConfigurationForLinux' or extensions has 'AzurePolicyforLinux'), 1, 0)
| extend hasSSH = iff(isnotempty(extensions) and extensions has 'AADSSHLoginForLinux', 1, 0)
| extend hasTagging = iff(array_length(bag_keys(tags)) > 0, 1, 0)
| extend hasUpdateMgr = iff(isnotnull(properties.osProfile.linuxConfiguration.patchSettings), 1, 0)
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    ['Update Manager'] = sum(hasUpdateMgr),
    ['Defender for Cloud'] = sum(hasDefender),
    ['Monitoring (AMA)'] = sum(hasAMA),
    ['Guest Configuration'] = sum(hasGuestConfig),
    ['Entra SSH Login'] = sum(hasSSH),
    ['Resource Tagging'] = sum(hasTagging)
content.title: Linux Arc Capabilities Summary

formatters.columnMatch: Update Manager|Defender for Cloud|Monitoring|Guest Configuration|Entra SSH|Resource Tagging

content.json:
### Update Manager
Linux servers with patch assessment/management configured via Azure Update Manager.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend configured = isnotnull(properties.osProfile.linuxConfiguration.patchSettings)
| summarize count() by Status = iff(configured, 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
content.title: Update Manager Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend configured = isnotnull(properties.osProfile.linuxConfiguration.patchSettings)
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku, Status = tostring(properties.status), UpdateMgr = iff(configured, 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| order by UpdateMgr desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
### Microsoft Defender for Cloud
Linux servers with Defender/MDE extension installed for threat detection.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('MDE.Linux', 'AzureSecurityLinuxAgent')
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasDefender = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasDefender), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Defender Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('MDE.Linux', 'AzureSecurityLinuxAgent')
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasDefender = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Defender = iff(isnotnull(hasDefender), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), Status = tostring(properties.status), Defender
| order by Defender desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
### Guest Configuration / Azure Policy
Linux servers with guest configuration agent for compliance auditing.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('ConfigurationForLinux', 'AzurePolicyforLinux')
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasGC = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasGC), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Guest Configuration Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('ConfigurationForLinux', 'AzurePolicyforLinux')
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasGC = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend GuestConfig = iff(isnotnull(hasGC), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), GuestConfig
| order by GuestConfig desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
### Monitoring & Insights (AMA)
Linux servers with Azure Monitor Agent installed for log collection and monitoring.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'AzureMonitorLinuxAgent'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasAMA = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasAMA), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Azure Monitor Agent Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'AzureMonitorLinuxAgent'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasAMA = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend AMA = iff(isnotnull(hasAMA), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), AMA
| order by AMA desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
### Resource Tagging
Linux servers with resource tags applied for cost tracking and organization.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend tagCount = array_length(bag_keys(tags))
| extend Status = iff(tagCount > 0, 'Tagged', 'Not Tagged')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Tagging Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend tagCount = array_length(bag_keys(tags))
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), TagCount = tagCount, Tags = tostring(tags)
| order by TagCount asc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details

content.json:
### Entra ID SSH Login
Linux servers with AAD/Entra ID SSH login extension for identity-based access control.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'AADSSHLoginForLinux'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasSSH = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend Status = iff(isnotnull(hasSSH), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Entra SSH Login Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'linux'
| extend machineId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type == 'AADSSHLoginForLinux'
    | extend parentId = tolower(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions')))
    | distinct parentId
    | extend hasSSH = true
) on $left.machineId == $right.parentId
| extend EntraSSH = iff(isnotnull(hasSSH), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project Name = name, resourceGroup, osSku = tostring(properties.osSku), Status = tostring(properties.status), EntraSSH
| order by EntraSSH desc, Name asc
content.title: Server Details
